body.title: Granny: remove all tmux knowledge — bus assignment only
body.result: Removed _dispatch_cc0, import socket, _CC_DEFAULT_SESSION, tmux_send_keys branch; default config is now dispatch:bus mailbox:cc.0; T-granny-bus-flip-fake-completion resolved
body.description:
**Problem:** Granny daemon currently has tmux/send-keys knowledge baked in — dispatch='tmux_send_keys' config, session name constants, subprocess calls. That knowledge belongs in the CC shim, not in Granny.

**What to do:** Remove all tmux/send-keys code from devices/granny/daemon.py. Granny's dispatch path for CC.0: send a bus envelope to cc.0 mailbox, mark ticket dispatched, done. Remove `dispatch='tmux_send_keys'` from _default_config(). Remove any tmux subprocess.run calls. Remove session-name constants from Granny's code. This supersedes T-granny-cc0-dispatch-decision (update that ticket to cancelled/superseded).

**Affected files:** devices/granny/daemon.py, devices/granny/cc_worker_listener.py (ensure it doesn't have Granny's dispatch logic)
**Design rules:** bus/ owns comms routing; nothing outside bus/ speaks transport directly
**Scope boundary:** Granny side only. CC shim changes are T-cc-shim-ack-nag and T-cc-shim-priority-halt.
**Completion criteria:** grep for 'tmux' in devices/granny/daemon.py returns nothing. Granny dispatches by sending envelope to cc.0. Existing Granny tests still pass.
